title: The Copper Golem Mod!
description: A minecraft mod that adds a brand new mob from the mob vote: The Copper Golem! Just like it was presented in the show, this mob will randomly press copper buttons, that has been added to the game too|
body:
![The Copper Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b9b6b2581e245486d116ed39a77edb31ea61329.png)

# Description

## _The Copper Golem_

This is the Copper Golem Mod, that adds the Copper Golem! A new golem that was presented in the 2021 Official Minecraft Mob Vote. This mob won't spawn naturally, so you'll need to find a structure, called Archeological Excavation. By using the brush on the suspicious sand in this structre you can find The Oxidized Copper Golem Statue. Then you'll have to wax off the statue, power it with a redstone source and the Copper Golem will appear! Just like it was said in the Mob Vote the copper golem will casually press a copper button if he's above it.

## _Copper Buttons_

Copper buttons has also been added! There are four versions of them: the normal one, the exposed one, the weathered one and the oxidized one. They can be crafted respectively with one block of Waxed Copper Block, Waxed Exposed Copper Block, Waxed Weathered Copper Block and Waxed Oxidized Copper Block.The Copper Golem
